title: SnowPro Core Certification Practice Test
description: Free interactive practice tests for the Snowflake SnowPro Core certification with instant feedback, topic-level scoring, and detailed explanations.
longDescription: The SnowPro Core Certification validates your foundational knowledge of the Snowflake Data Cloud. Practice with questions covering architecture, virtual warehouses, data loading, security, and performance optimization. All questions include detailed explanations and links to official documentation.
